content:
3. Deadline: The revised assignment must be submitted within two weeks from the date of your original graded assignment’s return. This ensures you have adequate time to reflect on the feedback and make meaningful enhancements to your work.

4. Grading: The revised assignment will be graded anew, and the higher of the two grades – the original and the revised – will be recorded as your final grade for that assignment.

5. Learning Outcomes: I encourage you to view this process not just as a means to improve your grade, but as an invaluable opportunity for learning and skill development. Engage deeply with the feedback, understand where you went wrong, and strive to rectify those areas in your revised submission.

I hope this initiative fosters a supportive learning environment where you feel empowered to take charge of your learning and strive for academic excellence. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or need further clarification on this process.

Wishing you all the best in your academic endeavors,

Professor Padavano
context: From document: If you need to reach me… — chunk 6 (chunk 6/7)
